steps: Each anatomic segment arrives in a separate tube in HBSS, at Room temperature .
Weigh and bivalve each fallopian tube segment, but do not “mince” ( 100 mg - 200 mg, tissue per tube).
Place only isthmus/ampulla tissue (not fimbria) in 10 mL, pronase ( 100 mg - 200 mg, tissue per tube) and place on 37 °C shaker, 200 rpm, °C, , 00:05:00 - 00:10:00 .
Filter cell suspension #1 for isthmus and ampulla using a 70 μm filter, remove tissue and place in the digestion tube.
Rinse filter with 10 mL, DMEM/FBS . This is important for quenching the digestion.
Spin filtrate #1 at 400 x g, °C, 4 minutes , resuspend pellet in 100 µL, DMEM/FBS , place On ice .

Suspend bi-valved tubal segment tissue (all segments) in individual labeled tubes of digestion buffer. ( 10 mL, pre-warmed digestion buffer with 100 mg - 200 mg, tissue ). Place on 37 °C shaker, 200 rpm, °C, 30 minutes .
After 00:30:00 strain cell suspension #2 using a 70 μm filter, remove remaining tissue from filter and place back in digestion tube.
Rinse filter with 10 mL, DMEM/FBS to quench.
Spin filtrate #2 at 400 x g, °C, 4 minutes , resuspend pellet in 100 µL, DMEM/FBS , place On ice .
Repeat digest for an additional 00:30:00 with fresh digestion buffer from stock. go to step #7
After 00:30:00 (60 minutes total digestion) filter cell suspension #3 using a 70 μm filter.
Rinse filter with 10 mL, DMEM/FBS to quench. Spin the filtrate at 400 x g, °C, 4 minutes , resuspend pellet in 100 µL, DMEM/FBS , place On ice .

Combine cell suspensions On ice from supernatants 1-3 (ampulla and isthmus) or 2-3 (fimbria - no pronase step) in one FACS tube for each segment for a total of 300 µL for ampulla and isthmus, and 200 µL for fimbria.
Add 1 mL, red cell solution per 100 µL in each tube for each anatomic section (fimbria, isthmus, ampulla).
Vortex 00:00:05 and incubate 00:02:00 at Room temperature .
Centrifuge 400 x g, °C, 4 minutes . Remove supernatant and discard.
Re-suspend in 500 µL, DMEM or can proceed to washes.
Wash 3 times with 2 mL, PBS/0.04% BSA in a FACS tube. Spin at 300 x g, °C, 3 minutes in between washes.
Use 40 μm to filter after last wash.
Re-suspend pellet in 1 mL, DMEM/10%FBS .
Add DAPI at 1:500 for flow cytometry analysis for live/dead.
Apply 30 µL, single cell solution to the slide and allow slide to dry in the incubator for 00:20:00 - 00:30:00 .
Draw wax circles.
Fix with 4 %, PFA x 00:05:00 .
Wash 2 x 00:05:00 in PBS, store at 4 °C .
Wash with 2 mL, PBS/0.04% BSA in a FACS tube. (1/3)
Spin at 300 x g, °C, 3 minutes . (1/2)
Wash with 2 mL, PBS/0.04% BSA in a FACS tube. (2/3)
Spin at 300 x g, °C, 3 minutes . (2/2)
Wash with 2 mL, PBS/0.04% BSA in a FACS tube. (3/3)
